markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final check-in on the GrowthX \<\> Baseten partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Paused:** Baseten paused the partnership after an initial LLM-generated outline failed to meet its high technical standards, causing internal team concern.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Brand Risk:** Baseten's brand is built on engineering excellence and open-source contributions. The team feared LLM content, with its risk of "hallucinations," would damage this reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Baseten will now pursue a strategy of using deeply technical writers (internal or external) to ensure content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Door Open:** Both parties remain open to future collaboration on specific, lower-risk use cases like glossaries or landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Paused Due to Brand Risk

  - [Baseten paused the partnership after an initial LLM-generated outline failed to meet its high technical standards, causing internal team concern.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The team felt the outline was "so off" it risked damaging the Baseten brand, which is built on engineering excellence and open-source contributions.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Core Conflict:** Balancing the SEO/LLM traffic benefits of scalable content against the risk of publishing misinformation ("hallucinations").](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Baseten concluded the risk was too high and paused the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

### Baseten's New Content Strategy

  - [Baseten will now pursue a strategy of using deeply technical writers to ensure content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Writer Profile:** Must be deeply technical and understand Baseten's products.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Source Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [**Internal:** Engineers or the Head of DevRel (a published author).](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [**External:** Ghostwriters with deep technical expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Goal:** Prioritize quality over volume, focusing on a few high-impact articles (e.g., GPU comparisons) that have previously performed well.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### Potential Future Collaboration

  - [GrowthX remains open to future collaboration on specific, lower-risk use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Suggested Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
      - [Programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Glossaries](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**GrowthX Process Improvement:** Now requires 2–5 content examples upfront to set realistic expectations and align on what can be scaled vs. what needs expert creation.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Baseten:** Pursue the new content strategy using deeply technical writers.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Remain open to future collaboration on specific use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/AMf3FLpzPPQfzzsm5Jo-AqV96sCAkXFw?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
